text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen extends an invitation to Ikuno
Dictus, and the two of them head out together to
buy some training cleats.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Um, just for my own information, where might I
find cleats designed to help people get trim?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Ah, if that's what you're looking for, then I know
just the—

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Oh, um... I'm sorry. Actually, I think you'd be
better off asking a staff member.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh? Are you feeling under the weather perhaps?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Oh, no, it's nothing like that...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Then I'd very much like you to continue. Please,
tell me everything you know about cleats!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I can't. When it comes to cleats, I lose all restraint
and tend to babble on without realizing it...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
If that's what you're worried about, I think I can
be of assistance.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
If I feel that you're going on and on, I shall
intervene and stop you. What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: But I don't want to cause you any hassle...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Whatever do you mean? Think of all the times I
reach for dessert when I'm trying to watch my
diet. Or when I'm about to stay up too late
watching baseball.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
When I'm struggling to exercise restraint, who is it
that always intervenes? It's you, is it not?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Well... I suppose that's true.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You know, I'd like an opportunity to repay the
favor every now and then.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: If you put it that way... Let's get started.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
So, you're looking for training cleats specially
designed to help you get trim... Is that correct?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, I'm sorry. Was I rambling all of a sudden?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...Not at all. In fact, that's the side of you I want
to see, Ikuno! Do continue!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Well, there are several sets of cleats like that
in that corner over there. Why don't we take a
look?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days later...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: N-now hold on, cut me a little slack here!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Stay put, McQueen. It's time for your cleat check!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Oh, McQueen... Look at these...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Since I chose these cleats myself, I have a duty to
stay close to you at all times and make sure you
stay safe!
choice_data_list: Why do you have to go that far?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Well, if I had to say... I guess it's because I was
happy when someone did it for me.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
My legs were weak when I was a child, so a
certain cleat-fitter made a pair of cleats
especially for me.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
And for the same reason I mentioned earlier, that
cleat-fitter stayed close to me.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Their attitude and enthusiasm were just so cool...
I felt like I wanted to be just like that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...This is the first time I've heard about this.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry, I just—I was rambling again, wasn't I?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
No, you weren't. That was a wonderful story. In
fact, I'd like to hear more.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ah, how about this? In exchange for undergoing
your cleat check, I'd like to hear more of your
stories.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: You want to hear my stories?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes. If we're going to be close, we need to get to
know one another, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Oh! ...That's true. I see. I doubt my stories will be
especially riveting, but I hope you enjoy them!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Indeed. I'll be counting on you. For the stories and the cleats.
